creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

Hm.  I've restored the pkg-install file, but it seems to only be an 
issue (ownership) with pkg_install; pkgng appears to handle it fine. 
I'll add the port now as-is, but there's a note in pkg-install to remove 
when pkg_install is no longer supported.
